parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
database tuple
actor "Upper\nlayer" as UpperLayer

box "IP Layer"
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as IPv4Layer
database "Routing\ntable" as RoutingTable
end box

box "IPv4 Ineterface"
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as IPv4Interface
database ARP
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as LowerLayer

note over tuple: IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
UpperLayer -> IPv4Layer: IPdata
note over IPv4Layer: Allocate\nIPv4\nheader
IPv4Layer -> RoutingTable: dst=192.0.2.1
RoutingTable --> IPv4Layer
IPv4Layer --> tuple
note over tuple: IPv4.oif=ifp1\nIPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
IPv4Layer -> IPv4Interface
IPv4Interface --> tuple
note over tuple: IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
IPv4Interface -> ARP: gw=198.51.100.1
ARP --> IPv4Interface: mac=00:00:0e:00:00:01
IPv4Interface --> tuple
note over tuple: Ether.dst = 00:00:0e:00:00:01
IPv4Interface -> LowerLayer
@enduml
```
